query:
INSERT INTO products (asin, title, description, price, rating, reviews, imageUrl, affiliateUrl, category, fetchedAt) VALUES
('B0BXYZ123', 'PAVOI 14K Gold Plated Cubic Zirconia Solitaire Necklace', 'Elegant 14K gold plated solitaire necklace with cubic zirconia stone. Perfect for everyday wear or special occasions.', '89.99', 4.5, 3421, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71xyz123.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BXYZ123?tag=91791709-20', 'necklaces', NOW()),
('B0CDEF456', 'Zoe Lev Gold Birthstone Pendant Necklace', 'Beautiful gold birthstone pendant necklace. Personalized jewelry gift for women.', '129.99', 4.7, 2156, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71def456.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CDEF456?tag=91791709-20', 'necklaces', NOW()),
('B0DGHI789', 'Caitlyn Minimalist Rose Gold Stackable Ring Set', 'Set of 3 rose gold stackable rings. Minimalist design perfect for layering.', '45.99', 4.6, 1203, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71ghi789.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0DGHI789?tag=91791709-20', 'rings', NOW()),
('B0EJKL012', 'Mevecco Gold Hoop Earrings 14K', 'Classic 14K gold hoop earrings. Timeless style for any occasion.', '129.99', 4.4, 892, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71jkl012.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0EJKL012?tag=91791709-20', 'earrings', NOW()),
('B0FMNO345', 'KATARINA White Gold Diamond Eternity Band', 'Stunning white gold diamond eternity band. Perfect engagement ring or anniversary gift.', '399.99', 4.8, 1567, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mno345.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FMNO345?tag=91791709-20', 'rings', NOW()),
('B0GPQR678', 'Mejuri Gold Vermeil Necklace', 'Delicate gold vermeil necklace with adjustable chain. Hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant.', '79.99', 4.5, 1834, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71pqr678.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GPQR678?tag=91791709-20', 'necklaces', NOW()),
('B0HSTU901', 'Gorjana Parker Gold Bracelet', 'Elegant gold bracelet with minimalist design. Perfect for everyday wear.', '98.00', 4.6, 945, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71stu901.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0HSTU901?tag=91791709-20', 'bracelets', NOW()),
('B0IUVW234', 'Kendra Scott Elisa Gold Pendant Necklace', 'Statement pendant necklace with abalone stone. Signature Kendra Scott style.', '158.00', 4.7, 2103, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71uvw234.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0IUVW234?tag=91791709-20', 'necklaces', NOW()),
('B0JXYZ567', 'Ana Luisa Gold Vermeil Earrings', 'Minimalist gold vermeil drop earrings. Hypoallergenic and ethically sourced.', '69.99', 4.4, 678, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71xyz567.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0JXYZ567?tag=91791709-20', 'earrings', NOW()),
('B0KABC890', 'Catbird Gold Signet Ring', 'Handcrafted gold signet ring. Perfect for stacking or wearing alone.', '185.00', 4.8, 1456, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71abc890.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0KABC890?tag=91791709-20', 'rings', NOW());
